$comment: Secrets synced to every non-archived repo by scripts/github-config.sh. Add an entry here and re-run `make github-config`. Values are read live from 1Password (account: tkrumm) — only op:// refs live in git.

secrets.name: HYPERDX_API_KEY_PROD
secrets.description: ClickStack/HyperDX ingestion key. Public-by-design (write-only, scoped to ingestion). Used by frontend builds to embed into browser bundles and by CI workflows that ship OTLP.
